title: cordylanthus parviflorus
intro: Cordylanthus parviflorus, also known as the dwarf cone flower, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is native to the western parts of North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cordylanthus parviflorus include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies to treat colds, fever, and sore throats.
